codeReview.summary: Card.vue implements the required reusable card shell with header/default slots, target visual tokens, and long-text containment; Card.test.ts covers the core rendering and extension behaviors described by the feature.

summary: Pass. Reviewed the mission feature metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, skill instructions, and commit 0ab2e86. The card component and its focused tests align with the feature description and expected behavior, and I did not find any blocking regressions or missing required coverage for this feature.
